Description: Set up the base project using React Native CLI to replace the previous Expo setup.
Transfer all TypeScript screens components and assets to the new CLI project structure.
Update build.gradle and manifest files for proper native compilation.
Update hero images and item photos with high-quality Tunisian tourism assets.
Polish the transitions and layout for Welcome and About Us screens.
Create a slider or input for filtering hotels and restaurants by price.
Add a selectable list of services (WiFi Pool etc.) for advanced search.
Ensure users are redirected to the Home screen after login and cannot return to Welcome/About via back button.
Run the app on multiple Android devices to ensure smooth performance and layout consistency.
Configure CocoaPods and XCode environment for native iOS builds.
Create screenshots and metadata for store listings.
Generate signed bundles for Android and iOS for final deployment.
